audit_items.proof_trace: Data Streams price is assigned by default (L381-382: price=priceInfo.usdPrice, updatedAt=priceInfo.timestamp). The Data Feed branch (L385-401) is only entered when updatedAt < minTimestamp, so if streamsPrice.timestamp >= minTimestamp the condition is false and Data Feed is unconditionally skipped. The proof holds with no alternative overwrite path.
